MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ashley M. Wisniewski, Esq., Hardy Erich Brown & Wilson, 916-449-3880, for defendant and moving party
James J. O'Donnell, Esq., O'Donnell & Smith, 925-935-1707, for plaintiff and opposing party, appearing by telephone

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ZURN PEX INC.'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.
The demurrer is overruled as to the third cause of action and the motion to strike is granted with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff may plead inconsistent legal theories. The "tort of another" exception does not apply in products liability litigation. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Continued To Jan-30-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ZURN PEX INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Ashley M. Wisniewski of Hardy Erich Brown & Wilson (916.449.3800) for defendant and moving party; James O'Donnell of O'Donnell & Smith (925.935.1707) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.
Defendant provided a courtesy copy of the moving papers. The court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to January 30, 2012. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla Miller, Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
